title: Motivation as a tool of management and leadership
summary: 9609 AS — why motivation matters for performance and leadership.
learningObjectives: Define motivation in a business context.
Explain link between motivation and productivity.
Evaluate motivation as a competitive advantage.

simpleExplanation.title: Getting the best from people
simpleExplanation.summary: Motivated employees work more effectively. Managers design systems; leaders inspire commitment.
steps: Low morale raises absenteeism and turnover.

sections.content: **Motivation and leadership** (2.2.1) opens **Topic 2.2**. Link to **2.2.3 theories** and **2.2.4 methods** in essays.
